title: Market Brief — Friday, April 24, 2026
summary: Compute is scarce across all GPU classes. H100 availability sits at 11% (95/327), H200 at 17% (71/317), and B200 at 15% (179/460), all in severe shortage or near it. The dominant price signal today is H200 spot crashing 37% overnight to $2.84/hr, diverging sharply from its OCPI trade price of $3.65/hr and suggesting a brief liquidity flush rather than structural easing. B200 utilization surged 43pp in 30 days, confirming next-gen demand is real.
paragraphs: Compute is scarce across all GPU classes. H100 availability sits at 11% (95/327), H200 at 17% (71/317), and B200 at 15% (179/460), all in severe shortage or near it. The dominant price signal today is H200 spot crashing 37% overnight to $2.84/hr, diverging sharply from its OCPI trade price of $3.65/hr and suggesting a brief liquidity flush rather than structural easing. B200 utilization surged 43pp in 30 days, confirming next-gen demand is real.

At 1.25x TCO, H100 true inference cost on Llama 70B hits $7.21/M tokens and H200 hits $6.81/M. DeepSeek V3.2 at $0.378/M output and Meta Llama 4 Maverick at $0.60/M are both selling far below any self-hosted cost floor, burning cash to buy market share. Provider grades: OpenAI Strong, Anthropic Neutral, Google Neutral, DeepSeek Burning Cash, Meta Burning Cash.

B200 spot at $4.00/hr versus OCPI at $4.85/hr is undervalued by 17% with utilization screaming higher, making it the best risk-adjusted compute buy today. OpenAI o3 Pro at $80/M output is overvalued versus Claude Opus 4.6 at $25/M for comparable frontier reasoning, a spread that compresses as Anthropic scales.
bullets: 11% of H100 GPUs are available, the tightest supply across all three classes.
179 of 460 B200 GPUs are free, but utilization jumped 43 percentage points in 30 days signaling rapid absorption.
$2.84/hr H200 spot is 22% below its $3.65 OCPI trade benchmark, a dislocation worth watching.
0.378 cents per million output tokens makes DeepSeek V3.2 the cheapest frontier-adjacent model, selling at an estimated loss of $6.83/M versus H100 TCO.
72.7% annualized volatility on B200 OCPI makes it the highest-risk compute asset to hold unhedged.
21.41 on the LLMflation Index means token prices have fallen roughly 79% since GPT-4 launch three years ago.
